source: Battle-tested producing 'The Maneki Neko Death Cult' — a 24-episode scored audio drama (~10.5h) + 24-track album. Values are the exact CAST/ROLES from books/neko-death-cult/tools/record.py.

NARRATOR.label: Space Pirate Zero (SPZ) — THE brand narrator voice
NARRATOR.character: raspy, slight Belfast/Irish lilt, raw and punk, nihilist-then-tender; delivered a little fast with some chaos in it. This is the Space Pirate Zero voice — reuse it for any SPZ narration, VO, brand spot, or audio drama.

KAT.label: Cosmic Swing Kat / Daniela — the beloved (female lead)
KAT.type: ElevenLabs library — 'Lily', velvety actress, British middle-aged female

WOMAN.label: The Cult agent (female) — posh, affectless G-woman
WOMAN.character: monotone, lifeless, upper-class contempt; menace by restraint. Direct with [condescending, upper-class] tags.

MAN.label: The Cult agent (male) — sinister, posh
MAN.type: ElevenLabs shared library — 'Blackwood', Sinister & Posh British

BEARDED.label: The kind one / the Cancer-Man figure (never explained)
BEARDED.character: warm, unhurried, gives nothing away; cryptic

GUEST.label: Bit parts / the marks (male)
GUEST.character: flexible; used for the doomed rich men / the marks

usage_notes: Model eleven_v3 ACTS inline [delivery] tags (e.g. [dry], [building], [raw]) — put them at the start of a line. Great for expressive VO.
eleven_v3 DROPS whole chunks of text at low stability. Keep NARRATOR stability >= 0.5. A drop-guard (retry if response < ~220 bytes/char) is implemented in record.py.
Use the native `speed` voice setting (NOT ffmpeg atempo) — NARRATOR runs at 1.08 for pace/chaos.
Inline <break time="0.4s"/> tags are IGNORED by v3 — insert real silence in post (ffmpeg anullsrc) at those points.
API key lives in ELEVENLABS_API_KEY (autonovel parent .env). SDK 2.56.0+: client.text_to_speech.convert(voice_id, model_id, text, voice_settings).
Run generation with: uv run --with elevenlabs python3 ...
python_snippet:
import os
from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs
c = ElevenLabs(api_key=os.environ['ELEVENLABS_API_KEY'])
SPZ = {'voice_id':'8bOIcU4hJx9LYJV4NS1I','model_id':'eleven_v3','voice_settings':{'stability':0.5,'similarity_boost':0.85,'style':0.35,'use_speaker_boost':True,'speed':1.08}}
audio = c.text_to_speech.convert(voice_id=SPZ['voice_id'], model_id=SPZ['model_id'], text='[dry] Signal finds signal.', voice_settings=SPZ['voice_settings'])
open('spz.mp3','wb').write(b''.join(audio))
